title: Hyperrealistic Portrait Guide
description: A comprehensive 50-page guide covering proportions, shading techniques, and step-by-step detailing of facial features.

title: Charcoal Masterclass
description: 10+ hours of video lessons detailing willow charcoal, compressed charcoal, carbon pencils, and texture rendering.

title: Free Sketching Worksheets
description: Printable worksheets with exercises for shading, line quality, and hand-eye coordination drills.
